title: Umami Grilled Italian Mixed Peppers Tiramisu
description: A unique Tuscan dessert featuring the sweetness of grilled Italian mixed peppers, combined with the richness of creamy mascarpone cheese and espresso, all layered in a traditional tiramisu form.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Brush the Italian mixed peppers with unsalted butter and season with salt.
Grill the mixed peppers until tender and slightly charred, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Soak the ladyfingers in espresso for about 3-5 seconds on each side, until they are soft and pliable.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the mascarpone cheese, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the large eggs until well-beaten.
Layer the ladyfingers, mascarpone mixture, and grilled Italian mixed peppers in a large serving dish, repeating the layers two more times.
Dust the top of the tiramisu with a thin layer of cocoa powder, if desired.
